title: buxus revoluta
intro: Buxus revoluta, also known as boxwood, is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree that belongs to the Buxaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Buxus revoluta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Buxus revoluta can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
